channel.title: bigdata on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in bigdata on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Getting started with Azure Data Explorer and Azure Synapse Analytics for Big Data processing
item.description: Azure Data Explorer is a fully managed data analytics service that can handle large volumes of diverse data from any data source, such as websites, applications, IoT devices, and more.

item.title: Securely access Azure SQL Database from Azure Synapse
item.description: The Apache Spark connector for Azure SQL Database (and SQL Server) enables these databases to be used as input data sources and output data sinks for Apache Spark jobs.
